title: Recruiting Outreach Scripts
content:
# Recruiting Outreach Scripts — Week of 2026-03-09

Goal: start conversations with qualified agents (not hard-sell).

## ICP (Ideal Agent)
- 2+ years active
- ~$100k GCI range (productive but not maxed out)
- Signs of growth friction (lead flow, support, operations)

## Script 1 — Cold DM (Instagram/Facebook)
"Hey [Name] — I like how you’re showing up in [market/neighborhood]. Quick question: if your brokerage could improve one thing for your next growth phase, what would it be? I’m talking with a few productive agents this week and comparing notes."

### Follow-up if they reply
"That makes sense. I’m mapping what top agents actually need right now (not pitching anything). Open to a 10-minute call this week so I can learn what’s working / what’s missing on your side?"

## Script 2 — Text Outreach (Warm Intro)
"Hey [Name], [Mutual Contact] suggested I connect with you. I’m speaking with growth-focused agents about what support actually moves the needle in 2026. No pitch — just market intel. Up for a quick 10-minute chat this week?"

## Script 3 — Phone Opener
"Hey [Name], it’s Alex — do you have 30 seconds? I’m calling a small group of productive agents to understand what they wish brokerages did better right now. Not trying to sell you anything — just comparing patterns in the market."

## Discovery Questions (Use in call)
1. What part of your business feels most constrained right now?
2. Where do you feel under-supported by your current setup?
3. If you could wave a wand and fix one brokerage-related problem, what would it be?
4. What would have to be true for you to consider a change in the next 6–12 months?
5. What’s your production target this year, and what might block it?

## Objection Handling (Light, non-pushy)
- **"I’m happy where I am."**
  - "Totally fair — this is mostly market research. What are they doing that you value most?"
- **"Not looking to move."**
  - "Makes sense. Even if you stay put, what would you want more of this year: leads, systems, brand, or mentorship?"
- **"Too busy."**
  - "Understood. I can send 3 quick questions by text so you can answer async."

## Weekly Execution Target
- 5 new outreaches/day (Mon–Fri)
- 2 follow-ups/day
- 3 discovery calls booked by end of week
